title: lessingianthus eitenii
intro: Lessingianthus eitenii, also known as Brazilian fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lessingianthus eitenii include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and potentially helping to manage certain types of infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or using the plant in a topical ointment to apply directly to affected areas.
